title: Diamond Diadem
description: Whenever you play [blue]2[/blue] or fewer cards in a turn, take half damage from enemies.
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Tracks cards played per turn with a counter display. When turn ends with 2 or fewer cards played, applies DiamondDiademPower which provides half damage reduction.
